one_time_description: Specific Land Claim settlement approved in 2020 - Nation received $21,428,571 and right to 560 acres of additional land
economic_notes: BCFN Gaming revenue of $548,960. Real Estate Group Limited Partnerships generating $649,527 rental income. Forestry/timber rights income $116,549. Trans Mountain pipeline income $20,000. Member distributions of $3,571,428 approved from land claim settlement. Post year-end Federal Court judgement settled for $136,896 to reinstate membership of one individual.
notes: Major one-time land claim settlement of $21.4M received in prior year (FY2020) drove the large prior year surplus. Current year deficit of $2.7M driven largely by $3.1M member distributions from land claim proceeds recorded as general admin expense. Nine OGO subsidiaries fully consolidated including four limited partnerships and five GP/corporate entities. Funds held in trust for minor children $522,648. Post year-end contingent liability for reinstated membership settlement $136,896 not reflected in statements. Remuneration schedules referenced pages 23-26 but full detail not captured in provided pages.
